The information about My coming has only been brought past it from this center.

About My coming, and then kundalaya.
So today we should say, the great day in the history of Divine Love, where I came to Australia.
They asked Me, was there any incarnation in Australia?
Take God, visit Australia, is the word God.

He has brought you all this, great Chandra, where Brahma, Vishnu, Mahesh also cannot enter here.
That you should stay here and grow into beautiful saints of any great magnitude in this world.
Such closeness to the Earth, it's such a fault to let them, such a presence, that even Indians will be jealous of.
One has to see how Shri Ganesha acts with us.
He is very important, to recognize Him, understand Him and invite.
Otherwise you will be wasting all His energy, staying in this place, living in this place.
I wonder how many people understand the word wisdom.
Wisdom is the center of gravity, which gives us the 12th room, on which we rotate, by which we realize that we are inclined to the left or to the right.
This 12th room, we have to be aware of, because otherwise we will not know how far we have gone.
How could you let us know that we are going to go?
The center of gravity and all four of us are so close together.
Because if your center of gravity and four of us are separated, there's no integration.
So wisdom means this integration between your understanding and the understanding of Shri Ganesha.
For example, we go to X streets, X street in India.
I will give you a very simple example.
I was going to Hong Kong and the lady who organized it, telephoned to me again and again and she told me that a big batch of people are coming to see you.
And you are going to be one of the television channels of the whole country, like, and this going to happen and that will happen, in the case when you have so much money, you describe it as same.
That I'll be a part of news and all sorts of things that are in stock with you.
And she was on and on and on and also she told Dr. Warren, except for giving the newspaper she did not take it.
And that kind of hysterical, not necessary.
If you go to such a little bit and pan it out, that there will be people coming inside the aeroplanes, just you know, it makes all you frustrated.
And there will be a car meeting near the aeroplane, just you know, and then all that.
I don't know who was waiting there, actually I'll be fine.
And when we reached there it was six hours late and I told Warren, it's all good, take a picture.
And the plane just deposited us in Bangkok.
There was no way. Six hours we had to take another plane in which nobody came in.
No power, nothing. When they are looking for her, you'll see her.
Then they called to the hotel, they said, no other units told. Warren thought, Mother has gone to another extreme.
Quite worried, they just know what is he missing as the aeroplanes are coming.
It's all a joke. Going the extremes has to be corrected.
Because if you get successful with your this kind of planning, then you won't be in this kind of artificial planning and not in planning.
Divine has its own way. We have to feel the balance of it. It works it out. You are destined to win, it works it out.
So if you try to do something of your own something too much, then who is going to suggest the balance is Shri Ganesha.
And that balance must be established.
Now there is no alternative for Shri Ganesha. No alternative. One must know.
Everything that is living has no alternatives. For example, if a man go and say that I will create a form of planet, come on.
There is no alternative. Whatever is there, it has to be seen and enjoyed. But not to force its way.
This is one of the things we have to establish our own.
Because of our concept, our idea about anything, even about God, about our achievements itself.
Can you pass it through? If you are used to it.
But in nature if you see those who grow, aren't they even bothered about what shape they are going to take.
Doesn't it measure itself up, know all the dimensions it is going to grow. It grows as much as it can.
Slowly, steadily, slowly it grows. Like that the wisdom is the one that understands.
It is an establishment, a state of mind, because it is the state of being when you become the outside.
Such a wisdom is given outside. What's the expression? Such a wisdom is given by a gentleman and a gentleman lady.
Only in a personality which is settled out. If you are frustrated, if you are unhappy, if you are suppressed,
very extreme, will not allow this power of this. So even in frustration you have to look back, you have to stand back and see for yourself.
What you like to be trusted? Count your blessings one by one.
Count your blessings one by one. I'll say again, count your blessings one by one.
Once you start counting, in such a short time, where are you?
Now the extreme projections of mind, that, oh I've not been to Greece, I've been to Latin America.
But in wise prediction you can see that you are what you are. You are saints.
You are born to be saints in this late time. You are specially blessed in the heaven.
You cannot stand on this earth to do this vahayoga. You have achieved that state.
And if you are saints, you should not be bothered as to few things like, oh I haven't got this, or something like that.
Which you have never done very much of it.
Any kind of extreme, be aware. For example, for materialism, if you are not so bad, in the sense, you understand the value of it.
But it possesses you. Let us take the wise path. We said, logically, it has to be logically. What do we possess?
Just think of one thing that we can possess. Except for your own spirit, you don't possess it.
Except for your revolutionary development, you don't possess it. For example, now you are a saint, you've been born a saint. This is what you possess.
It has to be logical. It's logical. You need not be realised to understand what it is thinking.
So what is it? We worry about our personal possessions. When you leave this worry, this is another reason.
It's the higher middle. You should learn with it's real. If you leave our possessions so material problems, it doesn't mean you throw them in the sea.
But the attachment, it is soar, it is soar. Like a lobster from the sea. She did not show them. Suddenly one man popped it. I was with him.
You see, imagine, I never knew about this. I went to a particular ashram or somewhere. He said, you know this lady? I've got her travel restrictions. And here suddenly I popped it.
How the news has been all over us. In the little seed, in the flower spring, how these bees come all the way. How the birds fly all the way. From Siberia to Australia.
What we tell is that magnetism in them. Magnetism that is in the Mother Earth which tells them this is the way you have to do.
So we have to see this magnetism within us. What makes this magnetism?
Is not what we could have. What a natural thing we have. But what naturally we have achieved within and we are not afraid to achieve it.
In fear you are never at rest. But even in fearlessness you are never at rest. In fear you might say that you are not afraid. You could be aggressive.
When people look very frightened, if you push them to the extreme of fright, they can come back. But if you are fearless, you are lessened. You are just dying, watching.
Fearlessness never makes you aggressive. So the confusion of our concepts can only be cleared out if there is magnetism.
For us, if somebody is addressing us, then we think, if we do not address the other person, we are frightened. Let's move. Then we are weak, we are weak people.
So we should fight back. Even when you are fighting back, you are weak. If it was not so, what is there to fight back? In fearlessness you become a witness.
You see the joke behind all this extreme behavior of another person. And also you know the technique, kaushalam. Yoga also means kaushalam, means technique.

How to manage the show by which his action doesn't work? If you want to. If you don't want, you can even take the action upon yourself to prove it that whatever you are doing is little silly and stupid.
Like Christ getting himself to the Spirit. It was a wise thing to do. Because if you have to prove that life is eternal, best thing is to die and show.

I had to be public, so that nobody should think that he was not dead. Still there are many people who are saying he was not dead. Still there are people who are talking that he was not dead, that he was alive, he got out of the place.
They don't know how to work this way. So he had to die publicly. And then the resurrection was to be seen by many.
This drama had to be performed for you to have the beast. Know that life is eternal. It doesn't mean that he was weak by any chance.
So the idea of our aggression or our suppression, both of them.
Either fear or some sort of a satanic pleasure to oppress others. So wisdom lies in seeing yourself also. See how wisdom is so important.
Throughout if you find in every chakra, is the life of every chakra. Because it is the wisdom that tells you whether you are in the chakra or not.
So how wisdom is important that you even become a satshi if you have wisdom otherwise you cannot. You become a witness only when you have that focal point and just get to your center of the energy.
That is wisdom. When people tell me about somebody who was haunted, they make such a dark of the ghost. As if it was another war that was fought.
Then you go and listen to another side, they paint another horrible picture of this. Between these two pictures you find the one is reflecting the other, the other is reflecting the other.
There is no end to it. It is eternal. How do you end it up? Only by your wisdom, by understanding itself in you.
The main thing is the mirror on which it is reflected. It's just an illusion that is appearing and we are worried about it.
The whole illusion will drop out as soon as you just see the mirror and don't worry about the reflections. They come and go. It is for you just to watch it.
That's all. The mirror is a mirror which is a solid thing and all the reflections are in you. That's how we miss all the sweet things.
After all, wisdom lies in understanding that you are the spirit. You are not holding on to it. You are the spirit. You are the spirit.
The attention was as animals was on food. They were food, nothing else but food. This goes higher and higher in awareness.
They came up to a point where they started thinking that he is the prime minister or he is an actor or an actress and does a sandal and does a football. They have achieved.
Or maybe they start thinking, oh, they are atheists, apnopho, etc. Communists, specialists.

It's a drama going on. They are wearing wigs after wigs. If they like this wig, they will wear this and they will wear this robe. It has killed the romance completely. You start loving the wigs of a person.
And wigs can be bought. They exchange. You go into the market, you can get say about ten types of wigs.
Suppose you say, oh, I like this color for the wig. Yeah. So the lady will go and wear that and then you like her for the wig that she has bought.
Then another may wear the same or the same lady who will buy you one wig before you come here because there's no living dynamism.
That's what it is. Every moment it's so beautiful. It breaks into new waves of such beautiful colors, beautiful colors. That's why we're lost with these bought images.

Every minute the image changes with the living personality. It's a tremendous beauty. But the first point is the wisdom to know that our images cannot be exchanged or worn or re-engaged or they evolve.
So we have to only seek your evolving force. Are we here or are we out here? Are we moving with our evolving force of getting ourselves crucified with all these artificial misidentifications?
That says that you are this, you are that, you are nothing but a seeker. It's a category I've told many a times that you are a seeker and you have to see. Now what do you see is your spirit.
And once you've found it, it's done. That's what you are. And to know that you are that spirit is love. It's so sensational. In itself everything is done.
Which is so joy-giving, is nothing but love. Is love, I think. I mean I cannot go beyond. There's no more human language.
Say, what is it? To me it is nothing but silence. Everything stops. Just feeling it. Where wisdom becomes love and love becomes wisdom. That's the real motivation.
Open your hearts. Allow Shri Ganesha to be settled in that. That innocence, which it was, everything, within the little one. Now they came forward to give me flowers every step, every moment.
It was so joyous, was creating such a beautiful, delicate triple in my heart. And it's so good as history for me. See, living that is sweet, ever since Ganesha's birth.
And the wisdom becomes so powerful that you know the source of love as Ganesha. Only we did not know anybody else but one that which is the source of love.
Never question anything. Never argue. No arguments. No new ideas being created. It's just taking in, working it out within yourself and the whole thing just goes on.
The more you enter into it, you'll understand that you have really entered into it. Then you'll do softer things. You want to have? All right, have it. What do you want? Want that?
You have a problem? Have it. It's all God's own thing. Who wants it? But God. He is the one who owns everything and He's the one who enjoys everything. And He wants you to enjoy everything.
Today, you have to show a power of that which is in which there is no artificial. It's so magical. But natural doesn't mean peaceful. Some people think to be angry is also magical.
You are a human being and a Sahaja yogi. Whatever is natural to a Sahaja yogi is not the same whatever is natural to a buffalo. We have nothing to learn from them. They have to learn from us.

So whatever natural to a Sahaja yogi has to be learned in the school of history. Not by any beautiful program or anything that I say, you don't do this, you do this, you are not to do like that, you are not to do this way.
Even in the Haryana, this portion is also. Now just see, this portion is the source for all things. But it doesn't say anything.

For example, this finger means something, this thumb means something, this finger means something, this means something. But this doesn't say, doesn't do anything. But without this nothing exists. If it is cut out here, you have parallel, all the movement is here.
This is the connecting link with the demand and the guiding link. This will be just which people can wear, how people can use this. All the things controlled in this.
They become better. The information will reach the whole world. You know, we have seen in operation in five children, in Australia, and the whole world will get the blessings of this.

And that the responsibility is too much. The responsibility is to keep the whole and possibly a few and send for all the veterans of the world.

Though maybe you will feel you are surrounded by all the world, but still you have to be very strong-willed. For the whole world you have to come up and send for that beautiful friends of a love-spirited world that the blossom time has found.
